TOOL_UNAVAILABLE.description: A required external tool or API is unreachable.

INSUFFICIENT_DATA.description: Not enough data to complete the task (e.g., too few matching volunteers).

CONTACT_INFO_MISSING.description: Volunteer contact information is absent or invalid.

HEADCOUNT_NOT_MET.description: Confirmed volunteer count is below the project minimum.

SCHEDULING_CONFLICT.description: An unresolvable calendar conflict was detected.

APPROVAL_REQUIRED.description: This action requires human approval before proceeding.

PARTIAL_DELIVERY_FAILURE.description: Some notifications were delivered but others failed.

UNRECOVERABLE_ERROR.description: An unexpected error with no defined recovery path.
